title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited:
Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited!
